martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, Sunday evening is looking perfect for a run, around 19:00–21:00 the conditions are ideal with a comfortable 19.1°C average temperature and minimal chance of rain. You might even convince Britt to join you for a sunset jog. The wind is moderate, but it shouldn't bother you too much during this time frame, so make the most of it.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, Sunday funday is looking great for a run, especially between 19:00–21:00 when it's a lovely 16°C with barely any wind. Not the best day for swimming, but if you're up for a chill ride instead, the morning's not bad, just watch out for some moderate gusts around 17 km/h. Maybe drag Martha along for a run when she gets home, and you can both unwind with a drink on the terrace afterwards.
